query:
SELECT r.id, r.type, r.status, r.refId, r.refType, r.scheduledAt, r.studentId, s.name as studentName
FROM reminders r
LEFT JOIN students s ON s.id = r.studentId
ORDER BY r.scheduledAt DESC;
